changed_files.diff_summary: Added TaskContext struct for passing existing tasks to AI. Added is_status_update and related_task_id fields to Extraction struct with serde(default) for backward compatibility.
Updated extract() prompt to include task context section and ask for is_status_update/related_task_id fields. Added build_task_context_section() helper function.
Updated extract() prompt to include task context section and ask for is_status_update/related_task_id fields. Reuses build_task_context_section from anthropic module.

Modified discover_with_ai() to accept existing_tasks parameter. When AI returns is_status_update=true, returns empty vec instead of creating new task. Creates synthetic event with task_context embedded in content. Added 4 new tests for status update detection.
Modified TaskDiscovery::discover_with_ai() to automatically build TaskContext from pending tasks and pass to discovery_ai. Added end-to-end test for status update detection.
Added is_status_update and related_task_id fields to all Extraction initializers to match updated struct.

acceptance_criteria: When user sends two semantically related messages, system detects status update instead of creating duplicate task
AI model receives existing task list as context for judgment
When AI determines status update, returns is_status_update=true with related_task_id
